input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8256 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.parquet:parquet-jackson:1.16.0; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The reported failure appears to be a stale/version-sensitive test expectation around Jackson enum annotation introspection after the embedded Jackson upgrade, not missing setup.

Tests that intentionally exercise deep reflection into JDK collection/date internals may still need local JVM/native-image opens already present in the existing scaffold, but this is not an additional dependency, Docker image, or environment prerequisite for reaching meaningful coverage.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: parquet-jackson is a self-contained shaded Jackson bundle used internally by Parquet; the resolved 1.16.0 artifact embeds relocated Jackson classes and its published POM has no runtime dependency setup to add. Meaningful coverage is reachable with ordinary in-memory Jackson-style tests against the shaded APIs.
